case_title: BRIDGE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT COMPANY VS. ANTHONY ADAMS JR ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BRIDGE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ADAMS JR, ANTHONY AS AN INDIVIDUAL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 817 ELLSWORTH STREET SAN FRANCISCO CA 94110 SAN FRANCISCO, ** JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY ** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 68424252)
